summary: This document outlines the Software Development and Maintenance Plan for the AI Doctor & Patient Consultation Platform, adhering to ISO 13485 and IEC 62304 medical device standards. It details responsibilities across Software, Quality, and Business teams, and defines five key development stages from specification to release. The plan emphasizes risk management, verification testing, and compliance with regulatory requirements for medical software.
